stemHtml: In the event that all engine driven generators on board a large transport aircraft have failed, the RAT (Ram Air Turbine) has been deployed, but the RAT on this aircraft only provides hydraulic power, what will happen to the electrical supply?

options.a: Electrical power will be supplied by a hydraulic motor.
options.c: Only essential services will be fed by the battery.
options.d: Only DC services will be available through the inverter.
